name: Work-tracking visibility decision, hooks grill, template minimalism sweep

dates.duration_note: Single-day sprint, closed 2026-06-10. 11/11 shipped; 11 issues closed in the companion partition (EXEC-002, EXEC-042..051, all closed_in_sprint=4). Gates: process-adherence x3 (incl. one FAIL→repair→PASS at close), code-standards x5 (incl. two revise cycles), package-qa x3, alignment x5. Defect D4-1: phantom-wipe false alarm, no data lost, post-mortem in .excn/retros/. Id-collision repair: viewer-server track re-identified as EXEC-054/055/056.

team.name: scribe
team.owns: sprint/issue JSON, CONTEXT.md terms, the Retro Loop

goal: Decide and implement the work-tracking visibility question (ADR), run the hooks grill→PRD that unblocks the three hook ideas, and finish the template precise-minimalism sweep.

shipped.title: Grill→PRD: hook-invoked lightweight reviewers + smaller-model secretary work
shipped.summary: Grill ran 2026-06-10 (context-loaded session, caveat accepted): remind-only hooks (ADR-0006), per-feature opt-in scripts via a schema-validated .excn toggle config, sent-message nudge, load_progress.json record, clerk small-model offload. PRD-007 published and amended same day with the Instance update path (Brooks's added scope); broken into EXEC-046..050 + re-scoped EXEC-044/045.
shipped.notes: HITL, grill-first per the Lifecycle. EXEC-044/EXEC-045 stay in backlog pending this PRD.

shipped.title: Decide the gitignored work-tracking set; record the ADR; implement in the template
shipped.summary: ADR-0005 recorded; template gitignore reduced to *_progress.json only, root mirrors it, drafts/ drift removed; package-qa PASS.

shipped.title: Hook plumbing: toggle config + schema + stamped settings wiring
shipped.summary: Stamped hooks.config.json + hooks-config.schema.json + .claude/settings.json wiring + 5 fail-safe hook scripts; package-qa PASS, code-standards PASS.

shipped.title: Gate-reminder hook (default on)
shipped.summary: gate-watch.js: PostToolUse path-watch reminder + Stop block-once with stop_hook_active guard + verdict sensing; ships enabled; code-standards PASS.

shipped.title: clerk Invoked Agent + scribe delegation
shipped.summary: clerk.md (haiku-pinned) authored + scribe delegation bullet added; alignment PASS, Team Lead approved.

shipped.title: Update path: version stamp + update command
shipped.summary: framework-version.json marker on init + update verb (re-stamps invariants, drift persists via template-hash anchor, restores missing); stamp-policy.js data module; code-standards PASS, package-qa PASS.

shipped.title: Health check command
shipped.summary: doctor verb: per-feature enabled/disabled/firing/stale/broken + config validation + outdated via version marker; health-policy.js data module; code-standards PASS (after one revise cycle: named time constants), package-qa PASS.

shipped.title: Sent-message follow-through nudge (ships off)
shipped.summary: message-nudge.js implemented (sent-side additionalContext follow-through nudge, rules in nudge-rules.js, ships off); payload field names probed not live-confirmed — confirm against a live SendMessage payload before enabling. Gates PASS.

shipped.title: nothing-new-under-the-sun prior-art Invoked Agent (stamped default)
shipped.summary: nothing-new-under-the-sun stamped; demo against PRD-007 produced a sourced prior-art digest (.excn/research/prior-art-prd-007.md); validated update-path design vs cruft/copier, flagged additionalContext version-sensitivity (claude-code#18427).
shipped.notes: AFK once approved; demo against PRD-007.

shipped.title: Load-reporting hook + viewer lane (ships off)
shipped.summary: Hook side: load-report.js + load-progress.schema.json (rolling 5000-record window, ships off). Viewer side: per-Teammate load panel in viewer/ (absent-file off-state, broken-file named error, agent_type/agent_id aggregation). Gates PASS (viewer lane after one revise cycle: ONE_MINUTE_MS).
shipped.notes: AFK. hook side shipped+gated; viewer lane in flight.

shipped.title: Precise-minimalism pass over remaining template artifacts
shipped.summary: Precise-minimalism sweep: 5 explanatory clauses cut (PROCESS.md x3, scribe.md x1, nothing-new-under-the-sun.md x1); CONTEXT.md seed and remaining agent defs verified instruction-only; no CLAUDE.md stub exists (pointer text is code, out of scope). alignment PASS; root mirrored.

defects_discovered.summary: Phantom work-tracking wipe: Team Lead misread builder-B's git worktree as the main repo via relative-path checks after a stray cd, diagnosed a full deletion of .excn work-tracking, killed two gates mid-run and launched a recovery agent against a non-incident. No data was ever lost; no damage resulted.
defects_discovered.root_cause: Shell cwd left in the worktree; relative-path forensics; destructive premise acted on before verification from a fresh repo-root shell.
defects_discovered.fix: Post-mortem at .excn/retros/2026-06-10-postmortem-phantom-wipe.md; absolute-path forensics rule and persistent-Teammate spawning adopted for the rest of the sprint.

decisions.title: Work-tracking is version-controlled; only *_progress.json ignored
decisions.summary: ADR-0005. backlog.json is the single tracker; root mirrors template gitignore exactly; drafts/ drift dropped.

decisions.title: Hooks are remind-only with per-feature .excn toggles
decisions.summary: ADR-0006. Gate reminders default on; message nudge (sent-side) and load reporting (load_progress.json) ship off; mechanical record moves route to a small-model clerk Invoked Agent.

decisions.title: PRD-007 amended with the Instance update path
decisions.summary: Stamp records framework version; an update command re-stamps invariants only, reports drift; health check reports outdated. Brooks's added scope at issue breakdown.

decisions.title: Retro Loop outcome (sprint 4)
decisions.summary: Approved and landed: persistent-Teammate routing rule (TEAM_DIRECTIVE Routing, root + seed) and scribe-assigns-issue-ids (TEAM_DIRECTIVE Don'ts, root + seed) — both alignment PASS, Brooks approved. Rejected: the absolute-path forensics PROCESS edit (post-mortem records it; no doc change). Deferred: verdict-location decision rides EXEC-053; grill fresh-session pin unchanged.

retrospective_notes.title: Grill ran context-loaded again
retrospective_notes.body: The sprint-4 Work Grill (EXEC-042/043) ran in the planning session rather than a fresh one — second consecutive occurrence of the caveat sprint 3 recorded for acceptance runs. Carried for the Retro Loop: whether the fresh-session pin needs teeth or relaxation.

retrospective_notes.title: Sprint work ran on transient background agents, not persistent Teammates
retrospective_notes.body: builder slices, gates, and the recovery attempt were spawned as anonymous background Invoked Agents instead of the rostered persistent Teammates (builder, scribe). Contributing factor in the phantom-wipe incident: no stable owner to query, unmodeled side effects (the worktree), Team Lead doing scribe/builder work inline. Brooks directed this into the retro. Candidate TEAM_DIRECTIVE edit: sprint slices route to persistent Teammates; Invoked Agents are for gates and one-shot checks only.

retrospective_notes.title: Relative-path forensics produced a false catastrophic reading
retrospective_notes.body: Every absolute-path check during the incident returned truth; every relative-path check returned the worktree. Candidate PROCESS edit (Trust-the-deployed-state section): verify any data-loss premise from a fresh shell at the repo root with absolute paths before any recovery or kill action.

retrospective_notes.title: gate-watch verdict sensing misses where verdicts actually land
retrospective_notes.body: First live firings of the EXEC-047 gate reminder on the dogfood Instance: it correctly caught gate-relevant edits, but its verdict-clearing signal watches writes to .excn/*_progress.json while the Adherence Agents record verdicts in the sprint JSON step_log — so the Stop block fires even when gates are already running or logged. Candidate fix for the gate-watch rules: treat a step_log append to the active sprint JSON as verdict evidence (or move verdict logging to a *_progress.json record).

retrospective_notes.title: step_log practice vs sprint schema
retrospective_notes.body: Gates log verdicts to sprint_4.json step_log; sprint.schema.json (additionalProperties:false) does not define it, so the sprint record fails strict validation. EXEC-053 filed. Couples with the gate-watch verdict-sensing note: one decision should settle where verdicts live.

retrospective_notes.title: Issue-id collision from parallel filing
retrospective_notes.body: A parallel session filed a viewer-server track as EXEC-046/047/048 while this session had assigned those ids to PRD-007 hook slices; the collision clobbered the canonical records in backlog.json, rode through the sprint pull, and was caught only by process-adherence at close (lineage mismatch between issue text and fix lines). Repaired by re-identifying the viewer-server issues as EXEC-054/055/056 (backlog, open) and restoring the hook-slice records. Candidate fix: id assignment goes through a single owner (scribe/clerk) or ids derive from a collision-free scheme.

PASS — 0 violations; update verb and stamp-policy data module conform to all Structure, CLI, and Commenting rules

PASS, 0 violations — chartered slice EXEC-048 (PRD-007, ADR-0004 carve-out); single-responsibility mechanical executor, ownership-only language, minimal, Src-First respected
PASS, 0 violations — one delegation bullet under Partition mechanics; scribe keeps decision ownership, clerk gets execution; no scope or responsibility change

PASS on re-gate — magic literal 60*1000 in formatLastSeen resolved via ONE_MINUTE_MS named constant; 0 violations.

PASS - 0 violations. EXEC-002 precise-minimalism sweep: cuts remove rationale/restatement only; Lifecycle still states sprint JSON is source of truth; scribe universality kept in description line.

FAIL, 1 violation: EXEC-046/047/048 closed against PRD-007 hook work while their issue records still charter the viewer-server track (EXEC-046 prd:null, EXEC-047 empty acceptance criteria); sprint-to-issue-to-PRD lineage broken. All other completion, gate, sequence, and teardown checks pass.

PASS, 0 violations: EXEC-046/047/048 restored with PRD-007 lineage matching shipped fixes; viewer-server track re-identified as EXEC-054/055/056 in backlog with provenance and remapped depends_on; no in_progress items, decisions and retro notes recorded, mandatory gates passed. EXEC-048 deferral ruled non-blocking: alignment gate + TL approval (the mandatory gates for the ADR-0004 chartered change) passed and the deferral is recorded; acceptance-criterion demonstration is not a PROCESS close condition. Close completes when the push lands.
